scripts.dev: cross-env NODE_ENV=development npm run build --workspace=feature-flags && cross-env NODE_ENV=development concurrently --names 'server,client' --prefix-colors 'blue,green' 'npm run dev --workspace=packages/server' 'npm run dev --workspace=packages/client'
scripts.dev:ci: cross-env NODE_ENV=ci npm run build --workspace=feature-flags && cross-env NODE_ENV=ci concurrently --names 'server,client' --prefix-colors 'blue,green' 'npm run dev --workspace=packages/server' 'npm run dev --workspace=packages/client'
scripts.dev:staging: cross-env NODE_ENV=staging npm run build --workspace=feature-flags && cross-env NODE_ENV=staging concurrently --names 'server,client' --prefix-colors 'blue,green' 'npm run dev --workspace=packages/server' 'npm run dev --workspace=packages/client'
scripts.dev:production: cross-env NODE_ENV=production npm run build --workspace=feature-flags && cross-env NODE_ENV=production concurrently --names 'server,client' --prefix-colors 'blue,green' 'npm run dev --workspace=packages/server' 'npm run dev --workspace=packages/client'
scripts.dev:server: npm run build --workspace=feature-flags && npm run dev --workspace=packages/server
